# Marking Membership

```terraform
resource "foundry_marking_membership" "example-marking-membership" {
  marking_id = foundry_marking.example-marking.id
  marking_members = ["example-user-id", "example-group-id"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `marking_id` (String) ID of the Marking.

### Optional

- `marking_members` (Set of String) List of the IDs of the members (Users or Groups) of this Marking.
